zh.Elmore, Gloucestershire, England: 英國格盧斯特斯爾艾爾莫

zh.Shelsley Walsh, Worcestershire, England: 英國武斯特斯爾謝爾斯利 沃爾什
zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Margaret Walsh於1502年出生在英國武斯特斯爾謝爾斯利 沃爾什時，她的父親John Walsh17歲，母親Ann Alice Baynham15歲。她於1519年與John Rotsy在英國武斯特斯爾謝爾斯利 沃爾什結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。她去世於1558年在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾斯特盧德享年56歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾斯特盧德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Margaret Walsh于1502年出生在英国武斯特斯爾謝爾斯利 沃爾什时，她的父亲John Walsh17岁，母亲Ann Alice Baynham15岁。她于1519年与John Rotsy在英国武斯特斯爾謝爾斯利 沃爾什结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。她去世于1558年在英国英格兰格盧斯特斯爾斯特盧德享年56岁，埋葬在英国英格兰格盧斯特斯爾斯特盧德。

nameMeanings.name: Walsh
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Aileen, Dermot, John Patrick, Kieran, Declan, Eamonn, Colm, Donal, Seamus, Siobhan, Brennan.

English and Irish: ethnic name from Middle English walshe (Old English wælisc) ‘foreign, Welsh’. This form of the name was generally more common than Welsh , especially in Ireland, where it originally denoted a Welsh-speaking immigrant, in particular any of the Welshmen who arrived in the wake of Strongbow's Anglo-Norman invasion of 1170. In Ireland it is sometimes also a translation of Breathnach ‘Briton’.
English: in Yorkshire and Lancashire the name is sometimes a shortened form of   Walshaw  .

variants.name: Walshe
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Eoin, Murph.
English and Irish: variant of   Walsh  .

variants.name: McBratney
meanings: Scottish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Breatnaigh ‘son of the Briton’ (referring to the Welsh of Strathclyde). Compare Walsh and Galbraith .

variants.name: Welsh
meanings: Scottish, English, and Irish: ethnic name from Middle English welshe (Old English wēalisc, wēlisc) ‘foreign, Welsh’, for someone from Wales or a speaker of the Welsh language. Compare Walsh and Wallace .
Americanized form of Ukrainian and Jewish (from Ukraine) Voloshin or its Polish variant Wołoszyn (see Woloszyn ).

nameMeanings.name: Lady
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from Middle English lavedi, levedi, ladi ‘lady, female head of a household, woman, wife’ (Old English hlǣfdige). As a man's name it may have been used in mockery, or be short for occupational names such as Ladyman.
Hungarian (Ládi): habitational name for someone from Lád in Borsod County or Lad in Somogy County.

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Margaret Walsh was born in 1502, in Shelsley Walsh, Worcestershire, England, her father, John Walsh, was 17 and her mother, Ann Alice Baynham, was 15. She married John Rotsy in 1519, in Shelsley Walsh, Worcestershire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. She died in 1558, in Stroud, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 56, and was buried in Stroud, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Margaret Walsh est née en 1502, à Shelsley Walsh, Worcestershire, Angleterre, son père, John Walsh, avait 17 ans et sa mère, Ann Alice Baynham, avait 15 ans. Elle a épousé John Rotsy en 1519, à Shelsley Walsh, Worcestershire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1558, à Stroud, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 56 ans, et a été enterrée à Stroud, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Margaret Walsh 1502 in Shelsley Walsh, Worcestershire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Walsh 17 und ihre Mutter Ann Alice Baynham 15. Sie hat 1519 in Shelsley Walsh, Worcestershire, England John Rotsy geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1558 im Alter von 56 Jahren in Stroud, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Stroud, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Margaret Walsh è nata il nel 1502 nel Shelsley Walsh, Worcestershire, England, sua padre, John Walsh, aveva 17 anni e sua madre, Ann Alice Baynham, aveva 15 anni. Lei sposato John Rotsy nel 1519, nel Shelsley Walsh, Worcestershire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Morì nel 1558, nel Stroud, Gloucestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 56 anni, e fu sepolta a Stroud, Gloucestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Margaret Walshが1502年にイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアシェルスリー ワルッシュで生まれた時，父John Walshは17歳，母Ann Alice Baynhamは15歳であった。1519年にイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアシェルスリー ワルッシュでJohn Rotsyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1558年にイギリスイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアストロウドで56歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアストロウドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Margaret Walsh(이)가 1502년 영국 워스스터실르 셸슬리 월시에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Walsh(은)는 17세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Ann Alice Baynham(은)는 15세였다. 그녀는 1519년 영국 워스스터실르 셸슬리 월시에서 John Rotsy(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1558년 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르 스트루드에서 56세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르 스트루드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Margaret Walsh nasceu em 1502, em Shelsley Walsh, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Walsh, tinha 17 anos e sua mãe, Ann Alice Baynham, tinha 15 anos. Ela casou-se com John Rotsy em 1519, em Shelsley Walsh, Worcestershire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1558, em Stroud, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 56 anos, e foi sepultada em Stroud, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Margaret Walsh родилась в 1502 г. в местности шелсли валш, ворсестиршир, Англия, её отцу по имени John Walsh было 17 лет, а матери, которую звали Ann Alice Baynham, 15. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Rotsy в 1519 г. в местности шелсли валш, ворсестиршир, Англия. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1558 г. в местности строуд, глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 56 лет и была похоронена в местности строуд, глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lady Margaret Walsh nació en 1502, en Shelsley Walsh, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, su papá, John Walsh, tenía 17 años y su mamá, Ann Alice Baynham, tenía 15 años. Se casó con John Rotsy en 1519, en Shelsley Walsh, Worcestershire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija. Murió en 1558, en Stroud, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 56 años, y fue sepultada en Stroud, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
